THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RAINBOW PIZZA, ITS EMPLOYEES OR AGENTS THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1083 MARKET ST, 1ST FLL PIZZA PARLOR, S.F, CA. 94103, STAYED UNTIL AUG-24-1993, IF DEFS.
